consignor.motivation: Consignor "Emballator Mellerud AB" from Sweden is explicitly found in invoice header and address block; the small address differences (Industrigatan vs Industrig., post code formatting) are within allowed normalization. Land matches exactly as Sweden after normalization (4.1.4). No contradictions found. Match by corporate name with allowed abbreviation of legal form (4.1.3.6).

Country matches exactly ('UTD.ARAB.EMIR' vs 'FÖREN. ARABEMIR' are equivalent). No conflicts identified.

goods_description.certificate_value:
48HU0155-280-300A & 49000215
2 pallets plastic bottles, HU 1L/28
customs tariff no 39233010
1 box plastic caps, cap 28 mm
customs tariff no 39235010
see attached invoice 95137957 dated 03.03.2026
goods_description.invoice_value:
4890005 Certificate fee Customs tariff no: 39233010 Country of origin: SE
4890004 Pallets Customs tariff no: 44152020 Country of origin: SE
48HU0155-280-300A HU 1L/28 55g nature,tactilesymbol 1.296pcs Customs tariff no: 39233010 Country of origin: SE
49000215 Kapsyl 28 mm svart UN-godkänd Customs tariff no: 39235010 Country of origin: SE
goods_description.motivation: Certificate specifies article numbers '48HU0155-280-300A' and '49000215' which exactly match invoice article numbers after normalization. The certificate refers explicitly to invoice number 95137957 dated 03.03.2026; invoice presents identical articles with matching tariff and country of origin, confirming the goods description.

quantity.motivation: The certificate quantity of '78,4 kg net weight' is exactly found in the invoice as 'Net weight 78,4 KG'. Units and numeric values match after normalization and capitalization. No conflicting weight values are present.

origin.motivation: The certificate country of origin is 'EU: Sweden'; the invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: SE' for all items, which matches Sweden. EU normalization rules apply, confirming match with country and union equivalence.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (Consignor, Consignee, Goods Description, Quantity, and Origin) were matched exactly according to the provided regulatory rules and normalizations. No mismatches or uncertainties identified. The invoice corresponds to the certificate fully.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland i certifikatet kan entydigt identifieras i fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
